_comment: Throwaway hook capture config for tests/. NOT auto-loaded by Claude Code (only settings.json / settings.local.json are). Loaded explicitly via `claude -p --settings .claude/hooks.json` by tests/run-hook-capture-test.sh to record the real payloads each hook event receives. The UserPromptExpansion matcher is empty on purpose so it fires on every slash command and reveals the actual command_name.
